documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the wireless_ble_ext category. Fits when the engagement needs: rtl8814au Drivers for the rtl8814au chipset wireless adapters.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: rtl8814au Drivers for the rtl8814au chipset wireless adapters.
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: git clone https://github.com/aircrack-ng/rtl8814au.git; make install. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `dpkg-buildpackage -b --no-sign`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd ..`; `dpkg -i rtl8814au-dkms_5.8.5.1-24835.20190115_all.deb`. rtl8814au Drivers for the rtl8814au chipset wireless adapters.
